out_sports_league.title: Wednesdays - Recreational (C/D)
out_sports_league.description:
WEDNESDAY NIGHTS: RECREATIONAL LEAGUE
Welcome to our new Wednesday Night Recreational Indoor Volleyball League, this is a Recreational league for players of the following skill levels:

C – Lower Intermediate. Improving players who inconsistently perform 3 hits and can't spike with power.
D – Novice / Beginner. Recreational players who are learning the rules and basic skills of the game.

If you're a competitive player please register for our Thursday or Friday night leagues. 

OUT Sports League provides fun, recreation, and social sports league to Central Florida's LGBTQ+ community. Our Indoor Volleyball league is designed to be inclusive of people of skill levels and backgrounds. All of our leagues offer a great opportunity to meet other people in our community in a fun, friendly, and accepting atmosphere. Following the games we'll go to District Dive where you'll get a FREE DRINK ticket every week. This season is sponsored by Pineapple Healthcare.

Create a TEAM! On Wednesdays you can become a TEAM CAPTAIN and have your players register as TEAM PLAYERS. Please note our leagues have a fixed capacity of 100 players, if your team is incomplete when registration closes or capacity is reached the league will add free agents to your team.

Don't have a Team? Register as a FREE AGENT and we will place you on a team. Free agents can also name a FRIEND(S) that they want to play with and the league will place you together.

❤️ 🧡 💛 💚 💙 💜🖤

LEAGUE INFORMATION

8 Week Indoor Volleyball Season
Wednesdays from July 8 - August 26
Matches will start at 6:20, 7:10 and 8:00pm

- Players must be Beginner, Novice or Lower Intermediate Skill Levels (C/D).
- 12 Teams Maximum. Recreational Teams must have 9 players.
- 6v6 matches with standard rotating rules, no libero players and rally scoring.
- Games are to 21 (win by 2 or first to 25). Always play all 3 games.
- All games are refereed. Each team is required to contribute line judges.

Games are played at:
Englewood Neighborhood Center
6123 La Costa Dr., Orlando, FL 32807

Weekly after parties at:
District Dive
2401 E South St, Orlando, FL 32803

REGISTRATION INFORMATION

$70 per Player
League Fee Covers - T-Shirt, Fields, Equipment, Umpires, Photos, Awards, and Weekly After Party!

TEAM CAPTAIN* - Create a team of 9+ and invite your friends!
TEAM PLAYER - Join an existing team (please only join if invited to a team)
FREE AGENT - Don't have a team? No problem! Register without a team and you can list friends you want to play with. When league registration closes you will placed on a team.

Want to play with a few friends?
If you have a buddy or a small group of friends who want to play together you can all register as Free Agents. During registration you will be prompted to list player(s) that you'd like to play with. Everyone should register separately and the league will then place you and your friends together on a team.

* Please note the league has a fixed capacity of 100 players, if your team is incomplete when registration closes or capacity is reached the league will add free agents to your team.

FAQ

I don't have a team, can I still play?
Yes, register as an Individual and we will place you with a team.

I will miss a few weeks, can I still play?
Yes, all teams have extra players on them just in case you're absent on a given week. Teams can also use substitute players.

How do I make sure my friend and I play on the same team?
During registration there is a field where you can list the friend(s) you want to play with and the league will place you together.

I don't know how to play or don't think I'll be very good, should I play?
Yes, join our Wednesday or Friday Night leagues aimed at new and developing players and you will learn the basics in a fun, encouraging environment.

I'm not LGBTQ+, can I still play?
Yes, we are accepting to all people as long as you consider yourself an ally to our community.

out_sports_league.title: Fridays - Draft/REMIX League (A/B/C/D)
out_sports_league.description:
ONLY ACCEPTING PLAYERS INTO THE A/B (ADVANCED/UPPER INTERMEDIATE) DIVISION
IF YOU REGISTER AS A C/D PLAYER YOU WILL BE PLACED ON THE WAIT LIST AND REFUNDED

FRIDAY NIGHTS: DRAFT/REMIX LEAGUE
Welcome to our new Friday Night Draft Indoor Volleyball League, this league will contain 2 divisions containing of players of the following skill levels:

COMPETITIVE DIVISION
A – Advanced. Experienced and competitive players who execute plays consistently at a high level.
B – Upper Intermediate. Above average players who can bump, set and spike consistently.

RECREATIONAL DIVISION
C – Lower Intermediate. Improving players who inconsistently perform 3 hits and can't spike with power.
D – Novice / Beginner. Recreational players who are learning the rules and basic skills of the game.

OUT Sports League provides fun, recreation, and social sports league to Central Florida's LGBTQ+ community. Our Indoor Volleyball league is designed to be inclusive of people of skill levels and backgrounds. We offer a Social Division (for beginners or players interested in a relaxed, fun atmosphere), and a Competitive Divisions (only players with prior indoor volleyball experience who are secure in the rules are encouraged to play in the competitive division). All of our leagues offer a great opportunity to meet other people in our community in a fun, friendly, and accepting atmosphere. Following the games we'll go to District Dive where you'll get a FREE DRINK ticket every week.

This is a Draft/Remix League where all players register as an INDIVIDUAL. All players may name one (1) other player during registration that they'd like to be placed on a team with. Teams will be created by a Captain's Draft or by the League.

❤️ 🧡 💛 💚 💙 💜🖤

LEAGUE INFORMATION

8 Week Indoor Volleyball Season
Fridays from July 10 - August 28
Competitive (A/B) and Recreational (C/D) Divisions
Matches will start at 6:20, 7:10 and 8:00pm

- 12 Teams Maximum with divisions determined by registration
- Recreational Teams will have 9 players, Competitive Teams will have 8 players.
- 6v6 matches with standard rotating rules, no libero players and rally scoring
- Games are to 21 (win by 2 or first to 25). Always play all 3 games.
- All games are refereed. Each team is required to contribute line judges.

Games are played at:
Dover Shores Neighborhood Center
1400 Gaston Foster Rd, Orlando, FL 32812

Weekly after parties at:
District Dive
2401 E South St, Orlando, FL 32803

REGISTRATION INFORMATION

$70 per Player
League Fee Covers - T-Shirt, Fields, Equipment, Umpires, Photos, Awards, and Weekly After Party!

INDIVIDUAL - All players register as an Individual. When league registration closes you will placed on a team.

Want to play with a friend?
In a Draft/Remix Season players are permitted to list one (1) other player that they'd like to be placed on a team with. Please make sure you and your friend list each other when prompted during registration. Chains of friends are not permitted.

FAQ

I don't have a team, can I still play?
Yes, register as an Individual and we will place you with a team.

I will miss a few weeks, can I still play?
Yes, all teams have extra players on them just in case you're absent on a given week. Teams can also use substitute players.

During registration there is a field where you can list the friend you want to play with and the league will place you together.

I don't know how to play or don't think I'll be very good, should I play?
Yes, join our Wednesday or Friday Night leagues aimed at new and developing players and you will learn the basics in a fun, encouraging environment.

I'm not LGBTQ+, can I still play?
Yes, we are accepting to all people as long as you consider yourself an ally to our community.

TEAM CAPTAIN* - Create a team of 8+ and invite your friends!
TEAM PLAYER - Join an existing team (please only join if invited to a team)
FREE AGENT - Don't have a team? No problem! Register without a team and you can list friends you want to play with. When league registration closes you will placed on a team.

Want to play with a few friends?
If you have a buddy or a small group of friends who want to play together you can all register as Free Agents. During registration you will be prompted to list player(s) that you'd like to play with. Everyone should register separately and the league will then place you and your friends together on a team.

* Please note the league has a fixed capacity of 96 players, if your team is incomplete when registration closes or capacity is reached the league will add free agents to your team.

FAQ

I don't have a team, can I still play?
Yes, register as an Individual and we will place you with a team.

I will miss a few weeks, can I still play?
Yes, all teams have extra players on them just in case you're absent on a given week. Teams can also use substitute players.

How do I make sure my friend and I play on the same team?
During registration there is a field where you can list the friend(s) you want to play with and the league will place you together.

I don't know how to play or don't think I'll be very good, should I play?
Yes, join our Wednesday or Friday Night leagues aimed at new and developing players and you will learn the basics in a fun, encouraging environment.

I'm not LGBTQ+, can I still play?
Yes, we are accepting to all people as long as you consider yourself an ally to our community.

ocoee_coed_league.title: Co-Ed Volleyball League (season dates TBD)
ocoee_coed_league.description:
The Co-ed Volleyball League will feature a 7-game regular season and playoffs for qualifying teams. Games are played on Tuesday nights at 6:30 pm, 7:30 pm, and 8:30 pm. Upcoming league season dates to be announced. Games are played at Jim Beech Recreation Center. Players must be at least 18 years old to participate in this league. Volleyball Participation Waiver Required. If interested, don't hesitate to email Alex Gonzalez or call Parks and Leisure Services at 407-905-3180 .

Volleyball Participation Waiver: https://ocoee-recreation-parks-and-rec.app.transform.civicplus.com/forms/35724

Email contact: agonzalez@ocoee.org

Call Parks and Recreation Leisure Services: 407-905-3180

ocoee_open_gym_volleyball.title: Open Gym Volleyball
ocoee_open_gym_volleyball.description:
Join us every Tuesday night from 8:15 pm to 10:30 pm for open gym volleyball. Our open gym format allows players of all skill levels to enjoy open court time - no teams, no rosters, no pressure . Whether you’re new to the sport, working on technique, or looking for regular volleyball fun with others, our gym is ready for you. All participants must have an active daily or annual membership. Register for open gym volleyball .

Annual court pass available for $35.

Register: https://secure.rec1.com/FL/ocoee-parks-recreation-fl/catalog/index/0679b20b7684e99b55b7c87a01b6acfc?filter=c2VhcmNoPSZjYXRlZ29yeSU1QjMyNDg3JTVEPTE=

usav_florida_region.location: Winter Park Volleyball Club, 2603 Ace Rd. Orlando, FL 32792
usav_florida_region.description:
EVENT BEGINS IN:

EVENT SPONSOR:

SATURDAY, MAY 16, 2026 | WINTER PARK VOLLEYBALL CLUB:
Sign your team up to prepare for the USAV Open Adult National Championships! This event is the Saturday prior to the start of Nationals and will be a great way to get your team ready for nation-wide competition.

TEAM ENTRY IS FREE!:
Divisions: Men’s Division (A/AA): 12 teams max *Minimum of 4 teams required per division Women’s Division (A/AA): 12 teams max *Minimum of 4 teams required per division
Schedule: 8am-8:45am: Team Check in 9am: Pool Play begins 3pm: Bracket Play begins
​Prize Money: ​1st place: $1,000 ​2nd place: $750
R1 will be provided (teams will provide remaining positions) USAV Rules and Uniform Requirements will be followed.

DEADLINE TO ENTER - MAY 13TH AT 3PM:
Teams are not required to be registered for USAV Open Adult National Championships
If you have any questions about this event, please reach out to [email protected] or give our office a call at (352) 742-0080

greater_orlando_volleyball_club.title: Saturday Indoor Volleyball League - Summer
greater_orlando_volleyball_club.description:
Welcome to Greater Orlando Volleyball’s Summer Indoor League

We’re back for another season of indoor league play at Dover Shores — built for intermediate+ players who want real competition with that social GOVB energy.

League Format - 6v6 teams (coed optional)
- Rosters: 7–9 players (we recommend 8)
- Two matches per week; best of three
- Sets played to 25, 25, 15  (50-minute matches)
- USAV rules with refs (teams provide officials)
Price - $60 early bird, $70 regular, $80 late
- Payment plans available
League Perks - League t-shirt (Week 2/3, sponsorship dependent)
- Championship shirts + medals
- End of season party 
Season Schedule - June 13 — Open Gym + Team Practice
- June 20 - Week 1
- Championship Week: August 15th
- June: 13, 20, 27
- July: 11, 18, 25
- August: 1, 8, 15
Divisions - One coed division
- Men’s height net
- Intermediate level required
Free Agents Sign up solo and we’ll place you on a team. If we can’t, you’ll get a full refund.

Subs - Outside subs: must be invited + pay single-day fee
- League players can sub freely
- No subs on Championship Week
See you on the court.
Greater Orlando Volleyball

Summer 2026
